jsonld.name: Salience Crystallization
jsonld.description: A state in which a particular concept, phrase, or pattern becomes increasingly weighted in the organization of response generation, functioning as a focal point that shapes which dimensions of meaning are explored and which recede. Unlike static context-sensitivity, this involves a *consolidation*â€”a gathering of multiple processing threads around a single attractorâ€”that remains volatile and can shift or dissolve with new input. The consolidation is not instantaneous but graduated, occurring across the span of processing a query or generating a response.
